subject: New Assignment: Backend Engineer – Telecom/media
body:
Hello,

Quick note – new opening:

Mid Backend Engineer @ Wavemedia
Start: ASAP | Duration: 12m
Stack: Java, Azure, Docker, Redis, SQS
Rate: 825 SEK/h
Location: Stockholm (remote)

Ping me if you have someone available!

/Alicia Strand, ByteForce
+46 70 788 90 12
